name: JSON Select
description: Picks a value from a map of cases by key. If 'key' is present in 'cases', returns its value; otherwise returns 'default' (or null). Use for declarative branching when you have a discriminator string — like a switch statement.

key.description: Discriminator key to look up in cases.

cases.description: Map of possible keys to values.

default.description: Optional value to return if key is not found in cases.

result.description: The matched case value, or the default, or null.
